---
title: bureau dans While we're young
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557527/whilewereyoung_20220225_mjq9cb.png
description: bureau dans While we're young
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2022-02-25
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557527/whilewereyoung_20220225_mjq9cb.png)
